agentHolderDesc: The owner is the highest authority manager of the current AI assistant
allAgentPublishThird: All AI Assistants Can Be Published to Third-Party Platforms
availableRangeDesc: Set members/departments that can use this AI assistant
createPermissionPlaceholder: If 'Creation Permission' is not enabled, no one except the organization creator can create AI assistants.
creator: Creator
defaultAgentFriend: Default AI Assistant Friend for All Members
defaultAgentFriendPlaceholder: Support selecting any published AI assistant in the organization to become the default friend for all members, without requiring additional adding by members. After turning off, previously added ones cannot be canceled.
deleteAgentDesc: Cannot be recovered after deletion, please proceed with caution
downgradeSchedulingPlaceholder: Priority is given to horizontal scheduling, and downgrade scheduling is performed when horizontal scheduling is not possible. In extreme scenarios, it may downgrade from multimodal to unimodal models
editAgentDesc: Modify the assistant's basic information or process configuration

form.agentDescPlaceholder: Introduce the AI assistant, displayed to users
form.agentNamePlaceholder: Give your AI assistant a unique name

highAvailabilityPlaceholder: Enable high availability, the system will automatically schedule large models to avoid service unavailability due to large model exceptions
horizontalSchedulingPlaceholder: Only flexible scheduling for the same large language models, supporting scheduling between multiple access points from a single service provider or the same large language models across service providers
otherAdminDesc: Other management personnel for the current AI assistant
personalAgentTip: Members' personal assistants are not currently supported for management
publishAgentApproval: Approval Settings When Publishing AI Assistant
publishAgentApprovalPlaceholder: The approval process follows the order from top to bottom. When a single node has multiple people, an OR signature will be used. You can change the approval process order by dragging and sorting.
specifiedAgentPublishThird: Only Specified AI Assistants Can Be Published to Third-Party Platforms
thirdPublishApprovalPlaceholder: After turning off, you will not be able to add/modify third-party platform related configurations, and those already configured and published will become invalid. Only affects third-party platform usage capabilities, not internal use.
